meaning: n.室内的闷浊空气vi.呆在闷室中vt.使闷塞
examples: Open the window there's quite a fug in here.
There is a fug in here, please open the window.
None really; the privileged fug of the old has been airily democratised.
Through a fug of cigarette smoke, her hosts found her intense, charming, stubborn and prickly.
"You're missing the fun camaraderie of watching it at the same time as everybody else, " says Los Angeles-based Jessica Morgan, the founder of Go Fug Yourself, a celebrity fashion site.
